description: Create svd_specs.rs with ParamBits/SvdSection/SvdToneSpec types and static spec tables for SN Synth Common (228 bits), MFX (618 bits), and Partial (350 bits). Derive from docs/midi/08-supernatural-synth-tone.md. Include compile-time or test-time assertions that bit sums match expected values.
title: SVD parameter spec tables for SN-S
